headline: Assessing Ross Stores (ROST) Valuation After Earnings Beat Dividend Hike And New Buyback Program
summary: Ross Stores (ROST) has drawn fresh attention after reporting fourth quarter and full year results, issuing new guidance, lifting its dividend, and securing a new multi year share repurchase authorization. See our latest analysis for Ross Stores. The recent earnings beat, upbeat guidance, higher dividend, and new US$2.55b buyback have been reflected in the share price, with a 30 day share price return of 12.41% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 57.53%. This indicates strong momentum...
